**Evaluating strike announcement**

I need to determine if this content qualifies as a strike announcement based on the provided title and details. The title indicates a strike participation rate, specifically noting that "adesione del personale Atac allo sciopero del trasporto pubblico" was at 38.5%. It looks like this is about attendance at a past strike instead of announcing a new one. So, it appears I shouldn’t classify this as a new strike announcement.
